titleStmt.title: SII 15.162: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 162. (B.K. No. 23 of 1926-27.) NĀGĀVI, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar in the Kōdi-Basavaṇṇa temple.

This is dated the 5th regnal year of the king, Yuva, Chaitra 8, Monday. The paksha is missing in the date portion. The 8th tithi in the said month in both śu. and ba. actually occurred on a Tuesday. The date may be equated either with 1215 A.D., March 9, f.d.t. °59 or March 23, f.d.t. °53.

It records a gift of the wages due to him for the work done, to the god Mahābaḷēśvara of Nāgāvi by the local blacksmith Bommōja. The gift was entrusted into the hands of Sōmēśvara, the āchārya of the temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīmatu yādavanārāyaṇaṁ pratāpa cakra
vartti siṁgaṇadēvavaruśada 5 neya yuva saṁvatsa
rada caitra Aṭṭame sōmavāra byatīpāta saṁkramāṇadaṁdu
nāgāviya śrīmahābaḷēsvaradēvarige Ā vūra kaṁmā
ṟa boṁmōja śrīmahābaḷadēvara kamatakke kelasaṁ māḍida
hoṟehuṁja Āyadāyavaṁ biṭṭanu śrī mahābaḷadēvarācāryya
śrī sōmēśvaradēvara kālaṁ toḷadu dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi koṭṭanu [Ī]
dharmmamaṁ gauḍugaḷuṁ samasta prajegaḷuṁ pālisuvaru . śrī
Digital edition of SII 15.162 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
